compiled_state.title: Epic-closure gate update: completion-verifier reports SC9 coverage, SC14 FP rate, SC13 restart-drop
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## TDD Requirement
Update test in tests/scripts/test-epic-closure-sc-report.sh to assert all three SC reports (SC9/SC14/SC13) appear in completion-verifier epic-closure output.

This is an UPDATE task: existing test file (if already created in T6) gets additional assertions; or a new test file created here if T6 deferred.

Given: completion-verifier runs for epic 736d-b957
When: epic-closure verification runs
Then: output contains SC9_COVERAGE_REPORT, SC14_FP_RATE_REPORT, and SC13_RESTART_DROP sections

## Implementation Notes
Modify plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md to add epic-level reporting block:

In the Report section for epic 736d-b957 specifically (or for any epic with SC9/SC14/SC13 criteria):

SC9_COVERAGE_REPORT:
- Run preconditions-coverage-harness.sh; parse COVERAGE_RESULT
- Report: preventions_count, corpus_size, threshold, verdict (PASS/FAIL)

SC14_FP_RATE_REPORT:
- Query fp-rate-tracker.sh for each active ticket in epic scope
- Summarize: max_fp_rate_observed, tickets_in_fallback, overall_verdict
- Threshold: PASS if no ticket's rolling FP rate exceeds 10% sustained over 50+ events

SC13_RESTART_DROP:
- If baseline data available (from Story 1 capture): run sc13-restart-analysis.sh
- Report: baseline_rate, post_epic_rate, drop_pct, sc13_verdict
- If baseline data not captured yet: mark SC13 as PENDING (not FAIL) with note: baseline capture scheduled

The three reports appear in the verifier output as structured sections; these feed the epic-level final verdict.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] completion-verifier.md references sc13-restart-analysis.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'sc13-restart-analysis' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] completion-verifier.md documents SC14 FP rate check
  Verify: grep -q 'SC14\|fp.rate\|FP.*rate' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] completion-verifier.md documents SC13 restart-drop check
  Verify: grep -q 'SC13\|restart.drop\|RESTART_DROP' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] Structural test exists and passes for all 3 SC reports
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-epic-closure-sc-report.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet to opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
